description: Redesign admin dashboard with real KPIs, trial teams panel, recent activity. Add /admin/teams page with trial extension dialog (+7/+14/+30j + date picker), email notification, activity_logs audit trail.

userStories.title: Server actions: getAdminTeamsWithSubscriptions + extendTeamTrialAction
userStories.description: As an admin, I want backend actions to fetch all teams with their subscription data and to extend a team's trial period, so that the UI can display and modify trial dates.
acceptanceCriteria: app/actions/admin-team-actions.ts exports getAdminTeamsWithSubscriptions() returning teams with admin_name, admin_email, member_count, lot_count, subscription_status, trial_end
extendTeamTrialAction(teamId, newTrialEnd, reason?) updates subscriptions.trial_end via service role client
extendTeamTrialAction verifies subscription status is 'trialing' before allowing extension
extendTeamTrialAction inserts activity_logs entry with action_type='update', entity_type='team', metadata containing old_end, new_end, days_added, reason
Both actions use getAdminContext() pattern (getServerAuthContext('admin') + service role client)
npm run lint passes

userStories.title: Trial extended email template + emailService method
userStories.description: As an admin, I want an automatic email sent to the team's gestionnaire when their trial is extended, so they are informed of the new deadline.
acceptanceCriteria: emails/templates/admin/trial-extended.tsx uses EmailLayout > EmailHeader > Section > EmailFooter pattern
Template displays firstName, teamName, newTrialEnd date formatted in French, daysAdded count, and dashboard CTA button
TrialExtendedEmailProps interface added to emails/utils/types.ts
emailService.sendTrialExtendedEmail() added to lib/email/email-service.ts with category='admin', type='trial-extended' tags
npm run lint passes

userStories.title: Admin navigation: add 'Equipes' link
userStories.description: As an admin, I want an 'Equipes' nav item between Dashboard and Utilisateurs, so I can access the teams management page.
acceptanceCriteria: components/dashboard-header.tsx admin navigation includes { href: '/admin/teams', label: 'Equipes', icon: Building2 } between Dashboard and Utilisateurs
npm run lint passes

userStories.title: Admin dashboard redesign: real KPIs + trial panel + quick links
userStories.description: As an admin, I want the dashboard to show real KPIs (active users, teams, active subscriptions, recent interventions), a panel of teams currently in trial, and functional quick action links.
acceptanceCriteria: 4 KPI cards show real counts from DB (no simulated growth percentages)
Trial teams panel shows teams with status='trialing': team name, admin name, lots count, days remaining, 'Etendre' button
Trial panel 'Etendre' button opens extend dialog (from US-005 client component)
Quick action cards are Links to real routes (/admin/teams, /admin/users, /admin/parametres)
AdminDashboardClient: fix /admin/settings → /admin/parametres, remove logger.info from render
npm run lint passes

userStories.title: Teams management page with trial extension dialog
userStories.description: As an admin, I want a dedicated /admin/teams page with a full teams table and a trial extension dialog with preset buttons (+7/+14/+30 days) and custom date picker.
acceptanceCriteria: app/admin/(with-navbar)/teams/page.tsx server component uses getServerAuthContext('admin') + getAdminTeamsWithSubscriptions()
teams-management-client.tsx displays teams table with columns: Nom, Admin, Membres, Lots, Plan (badge), Trial end, Actions
Table has filter by subscription status (all, trialing, active, canceled)
Trial extension dialog shows current trial_end, preset buttons (+7j/+14j/+30j adding to current trial_end), date picker for custom date, optional reason textarea
Dialog calls extendTeamTrialAction on confirm, shows toast on success/error
loading.tsx provides PageSkeleton
npm run lint passes
userStories.notes: Server component + client component + loading skeleton. Table with filters, extension dialog with presets + date picker.
